name: runner
description: Sub-agent runner — runs agent definitions on Codex, Claude Code, Cursor CLI, or Gemini CLI from any host AI tool.

interface.shortDescription: Sub-agent runner for multiple AI CLIs.
interface.longDescription: Runs agent definitions as sub-agents on external CLI AIs (Codex, Claude Code, Cursor CLI, Gemini CLI) with isolated context. Define agents once in markdown and run them on any supported backend from a single host session.
defaultPrompt: Run this task on Claude Code as a sub-agent.
Delegate this refactor to Codex as a sub-agent.
Use Gemini CLI for the long-context analysis.
